attributes.action: Don't involve England in the Iran vs America war
attributes.additional_details: We dont want to get involved and stay safe.
attributes.background: We dont want to be fighting the US's pointless battles and interfere we want to stay safe and leave them to their war.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
